title: Associate Software Engineer-Intern
description: A polished archive of Divyarajsinh's 12-week internship work, including weekly learning, practical work, projects, and technical documentation across Python, Django, and Django REST Framework. Internship at TSS Consultancy Pvt. Ltd.
projectDescription: The internship project aims to explore and implement best practices in the design and development of a RESTful Web API utilizing MySQL as the database management system.

details.label: INSTITUTION
details.value: Government Engineering College - Rajkot, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Department
